abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} by barraging your foe with sling-bullets, mark progress twice on a strong hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} by launching stones at an advancing foe, you may choose one (before rolling).

  • Hold them back: Retain control on a weak hit, but only mark progress once on a strong hit.
  • Hit them hard: Mark progress one on a hit, but suffer -1 momentum.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by preparing stones of a special quality or material, add +1. Then, take +1 momentum or +1 supply on a hit.
